slides.title: Meet your body's *master antioxidant*.
slides.sub: Glutathione defends nearly every cell you have. Here is why it matters as you age.

slides.title: One molecule, many jobs
slides.body: Glutathione is made inside your cells. It neutralizes damage and helps your body *handle daily stress* on a cellular level.

slides.title: It recycles the others
slides.body: Glutathione helps restore vitamins C and E after they fight free radicals. One antioxidant *keeps the rest working* longer.

slides.title: Built for clearing cells
slides.body: Your liver leans on glutathione to bind and clear unwanted compounds. It is a quiet part of *everyday detoxification*.

slides.title: Levels fall with age
slides.body: Research suggests glutathione tends to decline over the years. That dip *is linked to* more oxidative stress in the body.

slides.title: Sulfur-rich foods help
slides.body: Asparagus, garlic, eggs and cruciferous veg supply the building blocks. These foods *can support* your natural production.

slides.title: Eat to *protect your cells*.
slides.body: Vibe Health logs the food, sleep, movement and steps behind aging well, then turns them into one daily Health Score.
slides.cta_text: search ‘Vibe Health’ on the App Store

caption:
Your body makes its own master antioxidant, and it does more than you think. 🌿

Glutathione recycles other antioxidants, supports detox, and slowly declines with age. Sulfur-rich foods like asparagus, garlic and eggs can help. Save this. 🔖

Vibe Health turns your daily habits into one simple score → link in bio.
